nasb.text: For Moses said, ‘Honor your father and your mother’; and, ‘He who speaks evil of father or mother, is to be put to death’;

esv.text: For Moses said, ‘Honor your father and your mother’; and, ‘Whoever reviles father or mother must surely die.’

cnv.text: 因為摩西說：‘當孝敬父母’，又說：‘咒罵父母的，必被處死。’

ccb.text: 摩西说，‘要孝敬父母’，又说，‘咒骂父母的，必被处死。’

csbs.text: 摩西吩咐过 ‘你要孝敬你的父母’      ，又说 ‘咒骂父亲或母亲的人，必须处死。’
